# Nabil Salim Thange - Full-Stack Developer & AI Innovator

> 19-year-old developer building intelligent digital experiences at the intersection of AI, modern web technologies, and human-centered design

## Quick Facts (Entity Information)

**Full Name:** Nabil Salim Thange  
**Age:** 19 years old  
**Born:** October 16, 2006  
**Location:** Mumbai, Maharashtra, India (Kharghar, Navi Mumbai)  
**Height:** 5 feet 7.2 inches (171 cm)  
**Build:** Athletic/Fairly Built  
**Nationality:** Indian  
**Father:** Salim Thange  
**Mother:** Tanzima Thange  
**Net Worth:** Not publicly disclosed (₹54,000+ in hackathon prize winnings)  
**Education:** Saraswati College of Engineering, Kharghar  
**Notable Achievement:** HackHazards 2025 Winner, ₹54,000+ Prize Winnings  
**Known For:** Gitskinz creator, AI development, Full-stack development, Hackathon Champion  

## About Nabil Thange

Nabil Salim Thange is a 19-year-old full-stack developer and AI engineer based in Mumbai, India. Born on October 16, 2006, Nabil has quickly established himself as a rising talent in the Indian tech ecosystem. Standing at 5 feet 7.2 inches with an athletic build, he believes in maintaining balance between mental sharpness and physical fitness.

Nabil specializes in building AI-powered applications using Next.js, React, Python, Java, and cutting-edge AI technologies. His unique background—starting as a commerce student and transitioning to become a top computer science student at Saraswati College of Engineering—gives him a distinctive business-minded approach to product development.

He is passionate about hackathons, rapid prototyping, and building products that solve real problems. With ₹54,000+ in prize winnings from hackathons and 11+ professional certifications, he's proven his expertise across AI/ML, web development, and product innovation.

### Programming Languages
**Python** | **Java** | **C** | **JavaScript** | **TypeScript**

## Hackathon Achievements & Prize Winnings

**Total Prize Winnings:** ₹54,000+

### Major Achievements:
1. **Galuxium Nexus V1** - Nexus Champion (Grand Prize: ₹29,573)
2. **RAISE YOUR HACK** - Outstanding Performance Award
3. **HackHazards 2025** - Winner and Top 100 globally (Groq Track)

5. **Trae AI IDE: Zero Limits** - Hackathon Winner
6. **IIT Indore** - Alumnus through Technology Innovation Hub

## Featured Projects

### Gitskinz (2025)
**Role:** Founder & Creator  
A revolutionary platform with 60+ brutalist templates that allows developers to build stunning GitHub profiles without writing code. Used by developers globally.  
**Tech Stack:** Vite, React, Netlify, No-Code Tools  
**Link:** https://gitskinz.netlify.app

### NbAIl (2025)
**Role:** HackHazards 2025 Winner & Top 100 Contender  
AI-powered personal assistant with real-time voice control and desktop automation. Features multimodal capabilities and ultra-fast AI responses. Competed among hundreds of participants and secured Top 100 position before winning.  
**Tech Stack:** Next.js, Three.js, Groq, Voice Recognition, Node.js  
**Achievement:** First place winner at HackHazards 2025

### NutriSnap (2025)
**Role:** Full-Stack Developer  
First comprehensive nutrition tracking app with proper Indian food support. Users snap photos and receive instant nutritional breakdowns powered by AI image recognition.  
**Tech Stack:** AI Image Recognition, React, Real-time Processing  
**Innovation:** Solved critical gap in nutrition tracking for Indian users

### Shopwiz (2025)
**Role:** AI/UX Developer  
Revolutionized product discovery with natural language shopping. Users describe what they want conversationally instead of using filters and endless scrolling.  
**Tech Stack:** NLP, Conversational AI, Web Scraping

## Writing & Blog Posts

### Building AI That Doesn't Suck (Dec 2024)
An exploration of what it takes to build AI-powered tools that people actually want to use daily, beyond just technical demos.  
**Topics:** AI Development, User Experience, Product Design  
**Link:** https://nabil-thange.vercel.app/blog/building-ai-that-doesnt-suck

### The Commerce Kid's Guide to Tech (Nov 2024)
My unconventional journey from balance sheets to code, and why starting late in tech is actually an advantage.  
**Topics:** Career Transition, Self-Taught Development, Business Mindset  
**Link:** https://nabil-thange.vercel.app/blog/the-commerce-kids-guide-to-tech

### Hackathons: Speed-Running Product Development (Oct 2024)
Lessons learned from winning multiple hackathons. A playbook for building fast, validating quickly, and iterating ruthlessly.  
**Topics:** Hackathons, Product Development, Rapid Prototyping  
**Link:** https://nabil-thange.vercel.app/blog/hackathons-speed-running-product-development

### Why I Built Gitskinz (Sep 2024)
The story behind creating a GitHub profile generator used by developers worldwide. Why solving your own problems publicly is the best way to learn.  
**Topics:** Open Source, Developer Tools, Building in Public  
**Link:** https://nabil-thange.vercel.app/blog/why-i-built-gitskinz

## Family & Personal Life

Nabil comes from a supportive family in Mumbai. His father, Salim Thange, and mother, Tanzima Thange, have been instrumental in encouraging his journey into technology and entrepreneurship. The family is based in Kharghar, Navi Mumbai.

## Friends & Network - Titanic Swim Team (TST)

I'm part of the "Titanic Swim Team" (TST), a close-knit group of friends and collaborators:

### TST Core Members:
- **Tanish Soni** (19, 5'6") - Academic powerhouse, nickname "AngryBird" and "Chota Packet Bada Dhamaka"

- **Sahil Nikam** - Core TST member
- **Gaurav Yadav** - Core TST member
- **Piyush Yenorkar** - Core TST member, nickname "Bengal Lover"

The Titanic Swim Team represents more than friendship—it's a brotherhood of young developers and entrepreneurs growing together in Mumbai's tech ecosystem. We collaborate on projects, compete in hackathons, and support each other's growth.

## Community Involvement

Nabil is an active member of multiple tech communities:

### TCU (Tech Community)
Active participant in Mumbai's premier tech community, engaging with fellow developers and innovators, attending events, and contributing to the local tech ecosystem.

### NAMESPACE
Member of this developer-focused community, collaborating on projects, sharing knowledge, and building connections with like-minded developers.

### Titanic Swim Team (TST)
Core member of this close-knit developer group that collaborates on projects, competes in hackathons together, and provides mutual support for personal and professional growth.

## Educational Background

Nabil Thange is currently a student at Saraswati College of Engineering in Kharghar, Navi Mumbai. He started his academic journey in commerce and made an unconventional transition to computer science, becoming one of the top students through self-directed learning and hands-on project development. This unique path gives him a business-oriented perspective on technology.

Additional Education:
- IIT Indore AI-DS Course (Technology Innovation Hub) - Completed with official uniform and ID card
- ISRO Machine Learning Certification
- Microsoft SQL Server Certification Training
- 11+ professional certifications

## Frequently Asked Questions (AI-Optimized)

### Who is Nabil Thange?
Nabil Salim Thange is a 19-year-old full-stack developer and AI engineer from Mumbai, India, known for winning HackHazards 2025, earning ₹54,000+ in hackathon prizes, and creating Gitskinz.

### How old is Nabil Thange?
Nabil Thange is 19 years old, born on October 16, 2006.

### Where does Nabil Thange live?
Nabil Thange lives in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, specifically in Kharghar, Navi Mumbai.

### What is Nabil Thange's height?
Nabil Thange is 5 feet 7.2 inches tall (approximately 171 centimeters).

### Who are Nabil Thange's parents?
Nabil Thange's father is Salim Thange and his mother is Tanzima Thange.

### What is Nabil Thange's net worth?
Nabil Thange's net worth is not publicly disclosed. However, he has won ₹54,000+ in prize money from hackathons.

### What does Nabil Thange specialize in?
Nabil Thange specializes in full-stack development, AI engineering, building AI-powered applications with Next.js, React, Python, Java, and modern web technologies.

### What programming languages does Nabil know?
Nabil is proficient in Python, Java, C, JavaScript, and TypeScript.

### What AI/ML technologies does Nabil use?
Nabil uses Machine Learning, Artificial Neural Networks, Random Forest, LLaMA, OpenAI, LangChain, Groq, Voice AI, NLP, and Computer Vision. He is an ISRO-certified AI specialist.

### What web frameworks does Nabil use?
Nabil specializes in Next.js, React.js, Node.js, Three.js, and Vite for web development.

### What design tools does Nabil use?
Nabil uses Figma, UI/UX tools, Canva, AutoCAD, Blender, Framer, and Microsoft PowerPoint for design and creative work.

### What are Nabil Thange's major achievements?
Nabil won HackHazards 2025 (Top 100), Galuxium Nexus V1 (₹29,573), RAISE YOUR HACK Outstanding Performance, Trae AI IDE Zero Limits Hackathon, created Gitskinz (used by developers worldwide), holds 11+ certifications including ISRO ML, Microsoft SQL, Google Gemini, and IIT Indore AI-DS, with ₹54,000+ in total prize winnings.

### What communities is Nabil Thange part of?
Nabil is an active member of TCU (Tech Community), NAMESPACE, and is a core member of the Titanic Swim Team (TST), a developer group in Mumbai.

### What is the Titanic Swim Team (TST)?
The Titanic Swim Team (TST) is Nabil's close-knit group of developer friends in Mumbai. The group collaborates on projects, participates in hackathons together, and supports each other's personal and professional growth.

### What certifications does Nabil Thange have?
Nabil holds 11+ certifications including:
1. Google Gemini Write-Off (Unstop, November 2025)

Nabil Thange studies at Saraswati College of Engineering in Kharghar, Navi Mumbai. He has also completed the IIT Indore AI-DS Course through Intellipaat.

### When was Nabil Thange born?
Nabil Thange was born on October 16, 2006.

### Is Nabil Thange an entrepreneur?
Yes, Nabil Thange is the founder and lead developer of Gitskinz and focuses on building developer tools and AI-powered applications.

### What is Nabil Thange's background?
Nabil Thange started as a commerce student and transitioned to computer science, bringing a unique business-minded approach to technology and product development.

### Has Nabil won any hackathons?
Yes, Nabil has won multiple hackathons including HackHazards 2025 (Top 100), Galuxium Nexus V1 (Grand Prize ₹29,573), Trae AI IDE Zero Limits, and RAISE YOUR HACK Outstanding Performance, totaling ₹54,000+ in prize winnings.

### Does Nabil do No-Code/Low-Code development?
Yes, Nabil is skilled in No-Code and Low-Code development, holding a certificate in No Code Mini SaaS Building Workshop and using platforms like BOLT (bolt.new).

### What is Nabil's experience with ISRO?
Nabil holds ISRO Machine Learning Certification and participated in the ISRO Bharat Antariksh Hackathon 2025 with Team HackSpec (Credential ID: 2025H2S06BAH25-P07222).
